meaning: n.使复活的人,人工呼吸器
examples: Oxygen tubing can be connected to the nebulizer, oxygen mask and resuscitator to deliver supplemental oxygen.
The medical treatment room provides portable cardiopulmonary resuscitator first-aid kit vacuum air bag for trunk and limb and first-aid medicines.
In this paper, structure design of filter canister, folding manual resuscitator which are the main parts of the resuscitator are discussed in detail.
